headline: BF.B Q4 Earnings Miss Estimates, Sales Beat on Pricing and Innovation
summary: Brown-Forman's Q4 EPS misses estimates, but sales beat on pricing and innovation led by Jack Daniel's Tennessee Blackberry amid a tough FY27 view.

headline: Is Tyson Foods (TSN) One of the 10 Oversold Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy?
summary: Tyson Foods, Inc. (NYSE:TSN) is included among the 10 Oversold Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy. On June 1, Goldman Sachs added Tyson Foods, Inc. (NYSE:TSN) to its US Conviction List as part of the firm’s monthly update. The firm said it expects Tyson to deliver earnings growth above consensus estimates, supported by its diversified protein […]
